Frequently Asked Questions

How do I reset my password? +
Open Wishlist → tap "Already have an account? Sign in" → enter your email → tap "Forgot password?". You'll receive a reset link by email within a few minutes.
How do I restore my Wishlist+ subscription? +
Open the app → go to your Profile → tap the settings icon → scroll to Wishlist+ → tap "Restore purchases". Make sure you are signed in with the same Apple ID used when purchasing.
How do I make a list private or public? +
Open any list → tap the "···" menu in the top right → tap "Edit list" → toggle the Public/Private switch. Private lists are only visible to you.
How do I share a list with someone? +
Open the list → tap the share icon in the toolbar. You can send a direct link via Messages, Mail or any other app. The recipient can open it in Wishlist or in their browser.
How do I add the Wishlist widget to my Home Screen? +
Long-press your iPhone Home Screen → tap the "+" button → search for "Wishlist" → choose a widget size → tap "Add Widget". Your lists appear automatically.
How do I use Wishlist on Apple Watch? +
The Watch app installs automatically with Wishlist. Open the Watch app on your iPhone → find Wishlist → tap "Install" if needed. Your lists sync automatically.
How do I cancel my Wishlist+ subscription? +
Go to iPhone Settings → tap your name → Subscriptions → find Wishlist+ → tap "Cancel subscription". You can also tap "Manage subscription" inside the Wishlist app.
How do I delete my account? +
Go to Profile → Settings → scroll to the bottom → tap "Delete account". This permanently removes your account and all data and cannot be undone. You can also email us at martinglauber09@icloud.com.
